overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character exploring a snowy mountain valley. The character walks along a frozen stream, encounters a ram, and continues through the snow-covered wilderness with pine trees and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley with frozen stream

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow along the edge of a frozen stream, exploring the wilderness

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees covered in heavy snow lining the left side of the valley
partially frozen creek with dark water visible, running along the right side of the path
deep snow covering the valley floor with visible footprints
snow-dusted mountain peaks visible in the distant background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a serene, snow-covered mountain valley. Tall pine trees laden with snow line the left side while a partially frozen stream flows along the right. The overcast sky creates soft, diffused lighting across the white landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley clearing where wildlife encounter occurs

events.description: character stops walking and stands still
character raises a weapon to aim at an approaching animal
a large ram with curved horns enters the frame from the center distance, running toward the character

agents.ego_description: stops walking to aim a weapon at the approaching ram, tracking it as it runs past and flees

notable_agents.action: ram with large curved horns runs toward the character, passes by closely, then flees to the right into the trees

segments.scene_description: The character encounters a large ram in the snowy clearing. After stopping and aiming a weapon at the animal, the ram charges past and flees into the forest. The interaction occurs in the same snowy valley with the stream still visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley with prominent rocky peaks

events.description: character resumes walking forward along the stream

agents.ego_description: continues walking along the frozen stream, heading deeper into the mountain valley toward the rocky peaks

entered.detail: large rocks and boulders covered in snow along the stream bank

segments.scene_description: After the wildlife encounter, the character resumes walking along the frozen stream. The landscape opens up to reveal impressive rocky mountain peaks on the right, growing larger and more detailed as the character approaches. The snow-covered pine trees continue to line the left side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a serene, snow-covered mountain valley that gradually opens up to reveal towering rocky peaks. It begins with the character walking between a line of snow-laden pine trees and a partially frozen stream under a soft, overcast sky. As the character enters a snowy clearing, the movement pauses for a tense encounter with a large ram that charges past and flees into the forest. The scene then resumes its forward momentum along the stream, with the landscape expanding as the distant mountains grow larger and more detailed. Finally, the path continues through the white wilderness, framed by the persistent pine forest on the left and the imposing stone summits on the right.
